signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Start automating your invoice processing
signup.passwordPlaceholder: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol

landing.heroTitle: The Future of Invoice Processing Is Here
landing.heroSubtitle: Transform your accounts payable with AI that reads, validates, and routes invoices automatically — reducing manual work by 80%.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to automate invoice processing
features.sectionSubtitle: Four powerful capabilities, one intelligent platform.
features.aiAutomationDesc: Drop a PDF, snap a photo, or forward an email — our AI reads every line, extracts every field, and enters the data for you. Zero manual entry. Zero errors.
features.analyticsDesc: Ask questions in plain English. 'What did we spend on logistics last quarter?' Our AI analyzes your invoice data and delivers instant, actionable insights.
features.approvalDesc: Multi-level approvals that route themselves. Set rules once — by amount, department, or vendor — and let the system handle the rest. Real-time status tracking included.
features.integrationDesc: Connect to your ERP, accounting software, or any system via REST API. Import and export invoice data in any format. Your existing tools, supercharged.

howItWorks.title: From inbox to payment in four steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Invoices arrive via email, upload, or API
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI extracts data, validates against rules & POs
howItWorks.step3Desc: Smart routing through your approval chain
howItWorks.step4Desc: Track payments, get AI-powered spend insights

aiChat.title: Your AI Financial Analyst, On Demand
aiChat.subtitle: No more digging through spreadsheets. Just ask — our AI understands your invoice data and responds with charts, summaries, and recommendations.
aiChat.feature1: Spend analysis by vendor, category, or period
aiChat.feature2: Anomaly detection and duplicate invoice alerts
aiChat.feature3: Budget vs. actual comparisons in real time
aiChat.userMsg: Show me our top 5 vendors by spend this quarter
aiChat.botMsg: Here are your top 5 vendors by spend (Q1 2026):

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Invoice Processing?
cta.subtitle: Join companies automating their AP workflow with AI.
